libOverrides.bundle.mjs: app repo, automatic JSX runtime + solution-style root tsconfig: esbuild needs jsx:'automatic' (no cfg knob for it)

dtsPropsFor.BadgesCard:
/** Earned badge ids -> ISO date earned (from GameState.badges). */
  badges: Record<string, string>;
dtsPropsFor.TopMerchantsCard:
/** Transactions to rank merchants from (signed amounts; negative = spend). */
  transactions: { id: string; date: string; description: string; amount: number; category: string }[];
dtsPropsFor.TrendsCard:
/** Transactions to compute month-over-month category trends from. */
  transactions: { id: string; date: string; description: string; amount: number; category: string }[];
dtsPropsFor.VerseOfDay: /* No props — renders the verse for the current day. */
dtsPropsFor.ProgressWidget: /* No props — reads level / XP / streak from the store (StoreProvider). */
dtsPropsFor.ProgressChip: /* No props — compact level/streak chip; reads from the store (StoreProvider). */
dtsPropsFor.DailyQuestionCard: /* No props — reads the day's question and streak from the store (StoreProvider). */
